2605.11685.title: Robust LLM Unlearning Against Relearning Attacks: The Minor Components in Representations Matter
2605.11685.paper_summary: Large language model (LLM) unlearning aims to remove specific data influences from pre-trained model without costly retraining, addressing privacy, copyright, and safety concerns. However, recent studies reveal a critical vulnerability: unlearned models rapidly recover "forgotten" knowledge through relearning attacks. This fragility raises serious security concerns, especially for open-weight models. In this work, we investigate the fundamental mechanism underlying this fragility from a representation geometry perspective. We discover that existing unlearning methods predominantly optimize along dominant components, leaving minor components largely unchanged. Critically, during relearning attacks, the modifications in these dominant components are easily reversed, enabling rapid knowledge recovery, whereas minor components exhibit stronger resistance to such reversal. We further provide a theoretical analysis that explains both observations from the spectral structure of representations. Building on this insight, we propose Minor Component Unlearning (MCU), a novel unlearning approach that explicitly targets minor components in representations. By concentrating unlearning effects in these inherently robust directions, our method achieves substantially improved resistance to relearning attacks. Extensive experiments on three datasets validate our approach, demonstrating significant improvements over state-of-the-art methods including sharpness-aware minimization.
2605.11685.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLM）的去學習旨在在不進行昂貴的再訓練的情況下，去除預訓練模型中特定數據的影響，以解決隱私、版權和安全問題。<lb/>然而，最近的研究揭示了一個關鍵的脆弱性：去學習的模型通過再學習攻擊迅速恢復“遺忘”的知識。<lb/>這種脆弱性引發了嚴重的安全擔憂，特別是對於開放權重模型。<lb/>在這項工作中，我們從表徵幾何的角度研究了這種脆弱性的基本機制。<lb/>我們發現現有的去學習方法主要沿著主導成分進行優化，導致次要成分基本保持不變。<lb/>關鍵是，在再學習攻擊期間，這些主導成分的修改很容易被逆轉，從而實現快速的知識恢復，而次要成分則對這種逆轉表現出更強的抗性。<lb/>我們進一步提供了一個理論分析，解釋了這兩個觀察結果，這些觀察源於表徵的譜結構。<lb/>基於這一見解，我們提出了次要成分去學習（MCU），這是一種新穎的去學習方法，明確針對表徵中的次要成分。<lb/>通過將去學習效果集中在這些本質上更具穩健性的方向上，我們的方法在抵抗再學習攻擊方面取得了顯著的改善。<lb/>在三個數據集上的廣泛實驗驗證了我們的方法，顯示出相較於最先進的方法，包括敏感度意識最小化，顯著的改進。
2605.11685.author: Zeguan Xiao et.al.
2605.11685.authors: Zeguan Xiao, Xuanzhe Xu, Yun Chen, Yong Wang, Jian Yang, Yanqing Hu, Guanhua Chen
